Localization.Description: Attackers can exploit a WER service vulnerability that allows spoofing an executable file and running an attackers' file with system privileges

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} exploited vulnerability {detect} in the WER service and ran malicious file {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}

User {subject.account.name} exploited vulnerability {detect} in the WER service and ran malicious file {object.process.name} that created user {datafield1} and added this user to local group "{datafield4}" on host {event_src.host}
